location.origin: Tacoma, Washington (via Chicago, Illinois). Neko Case's early career rooted in the Bloodshot Records scene -- Chicago's insurgent country label. The Virginian (1997) and Furnace Room Lullaby (2000).
location.formative: The Bloodshot Records years. Folk-country roots. Twang, pedal steel, honky-tonk structures. The voice finding itself before the Anti- Records expansion.
location.career: Neko Case RETURNS -- first appeared at degree 66 (Alt Country, E=4, Anti- Records). Now in early folk context (Folk Country, E=3, Bloodshot Records). Fourth return artist. Genre Stage 69. Energy decreases from E=4 to E=3. Early career vs mature career.

labels: Bloodshot Records (Chicago insurgent country label; The Virginian 1997, Furnace Room Lullaby 2000; the scrappy, raw context before Anti- Records)

members.name: Neko Case
members.note: RETURN artist. Degree 66 (Alt Country, E=4, Anti- Records) and degree 87 (Folk Country, E=3, Bloodshot Records). Fourth return artist. Energy decreases on return. The voice finding itself.

associated_musicians.name: Neko Case (mature)
associated_musicians.note: Alt Country at E=4. Anti- Records. The mature voice. Same artist, different era. Degree 87 is the early chapter.

associated_musicians.name: Rocky Votolato
associated_musicians.note: Both PNW singer-songwriters with return appearances. Votolato energy held; Case energy decreased.

associated_musicians.name: Damien Jurado
associated_musicians.note: First return artist. Both explore different periods of the same artist. Jurado late career (84), Case early career (87).

associated_musicians.name: Jesse Sykes
associated_musicians.note: Both women with powerful voices in folk/country/dark-folk. PNW dark-folk lineage shared.

associated_musicians.name: Acid Tongue
associated_musicians.note: Both in the folk-country space. Acid Tongue band, Case solo. Twang and country structures shared.

theory_nodes.concept: The emerging twang (eighty-eighth acoustic element -- early Neko Case voice filtered through folk-country structures; pedal steel, twangy guitars, country rhythms; the voice hints at the force it will become; the twang is emerging, present but not dominant; organic after electronic)
examples: Neko Case Early Folk (degree 87) -- The Virginian (1997), Furnace Room Lullaby (2000). Pedal steel, twang, honky-tonk. The voice finding its power.
Contrast with the electronic pulse (degree 86, Postal Service) -- from synthesizers back to pedal steel. Maximum electronic to maximum organic. The engine swings.
The emerging twang is restrained power -- the voice has force but doesn't fully deploy it. Country structures contain the voice rather than frame it.
theory_nodes.description: The emerging twang is the eighty-eighth acoustic element. Early Neko Case voice filtered through folk-country structures. Organic after electronic. The voice finding its power.

ancestors: The electronic pulse (degree 86, Postal Service) -- maximum electronic. The emerging twang returns to acoustic instruments.
The stripped confession (degree 85, Votolato) -- minimal voice. The emerging twang adds instrumentation but restrains vocal power.
genealogy.relationship: Eighty-eight acoustic elements across eighty-seven degrees. Track element 89 at degree 88.

theory_nodes.concept: The early chapter (eighty-eighth artist-city pattern -- return artist in their earlier context; the formative years before the mature work; engine encounters the beginning after the bloom; hindsight as listening mode; inverted chronology)
examples: Neko Case (degree 87) -- returns in early folk context. Degree 66 was the mature voice. Degree 87 is the Bloodshot years. The beginning after the bloom.
The early chapter inverts chronology: the engine encountered the mature artist first (66) and now encounters the beginning (87). Hindsight as listening mode.
Contrast with the side project (degree 86, Postal Service) -- lateral genre movement. The early chapter is temporal movement to an earlier era.
theory_nodes.description: The early chapter is the eighty-eighth artist-city pattern. Return artist in earlier context. Inverted chronology. The beginning after the bloom.

ancestors: The side project (degree 86, Postal Service) -- lateral genre movement. The early chapter is temporal movement.
The confessional return (degree 85, Votolato) -- return within genre. The early chapter returns to an earlier genre context.
genealogy.relationship: Eighty-eight artist-city patterns across eighty-seven degrees. Track pattern 89 at degree 88.

theory_nodes.concept: Fourth return artist -- Neko Case returns (66/87); fourth return: Jurado (45/84), Votolato (46/85), Death Cab (58/82), Case (66/87); first return where energy decreases (E=4 to E=3); return zone dense (82, 84, 85, 87)
examples: Neko Case: degree 66 (Alt Country, E=4) and degree 87 (Folk Country, E=3). Fourth return artist.
Return zone: 82 (Death Cab), 84 (Jurado), 85 (Votolato), 87 (Case). Four returns in six degrees.
Energy on return: Jurado E=3→E=3, Votolato E=3→E=3, Death Cab E=4→E=3, Case E=4→E=3. Energy tends to decrease or hold.
theory_nodes.description: Fourth return artist at degree 87. Neko Case returns. Energy decreases E=4 to E=3. Return zone dense.

ancestors: Death Cab return at degree 82 (third return). Gibbard triple at degree 86.
Votolato return at degree 85 (second return). Case follows two degrees later.
genealogy.relationship: Fourth return at degree 87. Track future returns.

theory_nodes.concept: Folk Country at Genre Stage 69 -- Neko Case early work; Bloodshot Records context; twang, pedal steel, honky-tonk; connected to Acid Tongue (78); distinguished from Alt Country (66) by rawer folk-country roots
examples: Neko Case (degree 87) -- Folk Country at Genre Stage 69. The Virginian (1997), Furnace Room Lullaby (2000).
Distinguished from Alt Country (degree 66) -- rawer, more traditional folk-country roots. Bloodshot vs Anti-.
Connected to Acid Tongue (degree 78) -- both in the folk-country space.
theory_nodes.description: Folk Country at Genre Stage 69. Bloodshot Records context. Rawer than Alt Country (66). Connected to Acid Tongue (78).

ancestors: Alt Country (degree 66, Case) -- mature Case. Folk Country is the earlier, rawer version.
genealogy.relationship: Genre Stage 69 at degree 87. Track at 88.

theory_nodes.concept: E=3 at degree 87 -- energy decrease from E=4 (degree 66); first return where same artist's energy decreases; early career quieter than mature career; the voice before full power
examples: Neko Case (degree 87) -- E=3. Down from E=4 at degree 66.
First return where energy decreases for the same artist. The Bloodshot years are rawer, less expansive.
E=3 reflects the voice still finding its power. Not quiet, but restrained.
theory_nodes.description: E=3 at degree 87. Down from E=4 at degree 66. First energy decrease on return. Early career quieter.

ancestors: E=4 at degree 86 (Postal Service). Drops to E=3.
E=4 at degree 66 (Neko Case original). Returns at E=3.

theory_nodes.concept: Bloodshot Records -- Chicago insurgent country label; The Virginian (1997), Furnace Room Lullaby (2000); scrappier, rawer context than Anti-; insurgent country and punk-inflected roots
examples: Neko Case (degree 87) -- Bloodshot Records. The Virginian (1997), Furnace Room Lullaby (2000).
Bloodshot is scrappier than Anti-. The label context defines the sound -- insurgent country.
The Bloodshot-to-Anti- transition is the early-to-mature transition.
theory_nodes.description: Bloodshot Records. Chicago insurgent country label. The early, raw context before Anti- Records.

ancestors: Anti- Records at degree 66 (mature Case). Bloodshot is the earlier label.

cross_references.relationship: Original appearance. Alt Country at E=4. Anti- Records. The mature voice. Degree 87 is the early folk context -- the Bloodshot years before the Anti- years. Same artist, different era, different energy.
Return pattern parallel. Votolato at 46/85. Case at 66/87. Both PNW singer-songwriters. Votolato energy held; Case energy decreased.
Consecutive returns. Votolato returned at 85. Case returns at 87. Two returns in three degrees. The return zone continues.
Return pattern parallel. Jurado at 45/84. Case at 66/87. Both explore different periods of the same artist.
Return zone. Jurado at 84, Votolato at 85, Case at 87. Three returns in four degrees (84-87). Dense.
Dark folk women. Both women with powerful voices in folk/country/dark-folk. PNW dark-folk lineage.
Folk Country connection. Both in the folk-country space. Band vs solo. Twang and country structures.
